diagnostics.message: Component Q_SW references SPICE model 'BSS138' with no model source; the compiler emits no .model card for it (only the generic D, NMOS, NPN, PMOS, PNP) and ngspice cannot simulate the design.
suggested_actions: Import a SPICE .model that defines this part, or
Use a generic model (D, NMOS, NPN, PMOS, PNP)
